audit_findings.finding: _write_session_state used non-atomic open(w)+json.dump while sibling writers (bootstrap_context, save_tool_result) already adopted tmp+os.replace; crash/concurrent write could truncate session_state.json
audit_findings.remediation: Migrate to _atomic_write_json with default=str to preserve datetime serialization semantics
